details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ is missing.

governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, etc.). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot in code comments. Excluded: reports/audit/, docs/, MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md (documentation of removal).
